'''12-4C-41's droid revolt''' was an event that happened in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]]. In it, [[12-4C-41's Droid Army]] [[Droid supremacy|rose up against its oppressors]] in the hope of gaining [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] domination.

==Assault on the ''Decimator''==
The [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I-class Star Destroyer'']] [[Decimator (Star Destroyer)|''Decimator'']] entered the [[Kleeva system/Legends|Kleeva system]], awaiting the delivery of a new shipment of droids from [[Boonda/Legends|Boonda]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Boonda, however, woke up to find his droids attempting to kill him. The corpulent Hutt, panicked, escaped his would-be murderers using secret escape routes. The droids, led by [[12-4C-41]] (also known as Wuntoo), prepared to lead an assault on the ''Decimator'', which they planned to capture and take to [[Vactooine]], where they hoped to take over droid production.<ref name="Mission 9" />

In the ''Decimator''{{'s}} loading bay, the droids were inspected by Captain [[Pelvin]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Trooper]] [[1219]], but upon unloadng, Wuntoo attacked the Imperials, and his droid lackeys started a fire on the deck. Admiral [[Groot]] believed this to be a machination of Boonda, and ordered an attack on the Hutt's facility. He, along with Pelvin and [[Gammat Squad]], were able to escape the ''Decimator'', which was quickly overrun by the renegade droids. They are then attacked by droid-piloted [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIEs]] while approaching [[Boonda's Moon]], and the Admiral is injured. Upon landing, the group was attacked by Boonda, but one of the troopers convinced him that they meant no harm. When Boonda discovered that the Imperials are not the ones who have caused the droids to revolt, he realizes that he needs to prove his innocence, and helps the troopers to destroy his own factory.<ref name="Mission 9" />

Before leaving, the ''Decimator'' picked up what was left of the factory. Though Boonda believed that there was nothing of worth within, Wuntoo had a cadre of specially designed [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] that he had been keeping in reserve. Storing them aboard the ''Decimator'', Wuntoo set course for [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="Mission 9" />
